scripts.dev: concurrently -n service,web -c cyan,magenta "npm --workspace @obsidianlm/service run dev" "npm --workspace @obsidianlm/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @obsidianlm/shared run build && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/web run build && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/service run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @obsidianlm/shared run build && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/service run typecheck && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/web run typecheck && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/shared run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @obsidianlm/shared run build && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/service run lint && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/web run lint && npm --workspace @obsidianlm/shared run lint
